# Van Eickelen — Filmmaker & Visual Storyteller

> Sebastian Van Eickelen is a filmmaker, cinematographer, and visual storyteller based in Geneva, Switzerland. He creates cinematic brand films, commercials, and documentary work for global brands including Adidas, Nike, Cartier, Red Bull, Richemont, Decathlon, Salomon, and Mammut.

## About
- [Homepage](https://vaneickelen.com): Overview of services, selected work, client testimonials, and contact
- [All Projects](https://vaneickelen.com/projects): Complete archive of film and commercial work

## Case Studies
- [Adidas Terrex Campaign](https://vaneickelen.com/case-study-adidas-terrex): Mountain running campaign filmed in the Swiss Alps — 2.4M views, 156% above engagement benchmark, deployed across 12 markets
- [Decathlon Switzerland](https://vaneickelen.com/case-study-decathlon): Brand identity film for Decathlon's Swiss market launch — 1.8M impressions, 42% brand lift
- [Swiss Athletics](https://vaneickelen.com/case-study-swiss-athletics): Athlete portrait series for the Swiss Athletics federation — 820K views, picked up by SRF national broadcast
- [Beyond The Summit](https://vaneickelen.com/case-study-beyond-the-summit): Mountaineering documentary following alpine climbers — 4 international festival selections including Banff Mountain Film Festival
- [Luxury Hospitality](https://vaneickelen.com/case-study-luxury-hospitality): Cinematic hotel brand film — +68% website dwell time after launch
- [Startup Campaign](https://vaneickelen.com/case-study-startup-campaign): Product launch film for crowdfunding campaign — 340% funded in 72 hours, 520K views

## Services
- Brand Films: Cinematic brand stories and identity pieces
- Commercial Production: Ad spots for digital and broadcast
- Documentary: Long-form storytelling and mini-series
- Event Coverage: Premium event films and recap edits
- Creative Direction: Concept development and visual strategy
- Post-Production: Editing, color grading, sound design, motion graphics

## Equipment & Technical
- Primary camera: RED Komodo 6K
- Lens systems: Cooke Anamorphic /i, cinema primes
- Full post-production pipeline: non-linear editing, cinematic color grading, sound design

## Contact
- Email: hello@vaneickelen.com
- Location: Rue de Montbrillant 28, 1201 Geneva, Switzerland
- Available for projects worldwide
